title: Your decision board for serious options.
caption: Keep strong listings together, remember why they matter, and come back without restarting your search.

callout.title: Shortlists keep trust, price, and vibe in one place.
callout.copy: This is where RoomMatch starts acting like a decision-support product instead of a one-listing-at-a-time feed.

labels.comparisonCaption: Price, trust, household, and approximate area stay aligned so you can narrow down faster.
labels.notePlaceholder: Why does this listing stay on your shortlist?

states.emptyCopy: Start saving listings from Discover or the room page and they will show up here with your shortlist context.
states.comparisonHint: Save at least two listings in the same shortlist to compare them here.

privacy.note: Saved notes stay private to the seeker.
privacy.lockedDetails: Exact address and direct contact still unlock later.
